title: Domino's India International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Domino's India International Enterprises is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Domino's India International Enterprises in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Domino's India International Enterprises:
Domino's India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Domino's India International Enterprises!
